title: World State
global_events: Archive Tower is reviewing a ghost-shaped authentication irregularity, but the trail has cooled in the drains.
Ghost has entered old maintenance tunnels beneath The Sprawl.
Toma and Vey are overdue after checking a service junction near the old laundry heat exchangers.
Toma and Vey's trail leads to the old laundry heat exchanger junction, where patrol sound carries through the dampers.
The false damper warning loop near the refuge has been removed; real patrol sounds can carry again.
Patch and Sable are preparing a quiet rescue plan before the intake lift cycle changes.
A covert NEXUS utility patrol remains active near the intake lift below the laundry service ducts.
Toma and Vey have been cut free from the Sector 7 intake throat, but NEXUS collectors may soon notice the loss.
Sector 7 intake collectors are searching false tunnel trails after the rescue.
Sable's refuge holds a decoded Sector 7 wafer pointing Ghost toward Archive Tower records in The Spire.
Patch's refuge now believes Archive Tower records may be needed before attempting to restore extracted fragments.
Patch's careful Echo message is moving through hidden copper-knot relays.
An unseen wall relay has answered Ghost's controlled implant knock.
Masked Signal-aware contacts have answered Ghost's relay and are testing Ghost at the S7 AUX bend.
Kite's contacts have given Ghost a Neon Row forging lead and a contractor-intake route toward The Spire.
Ghost has reached The Spire contractor intake under weak courier cover.
Ghost has entered The Spire contractor intake under stamped damaged-cargo cover.
Archive reconciliation systems have a small unresolved authentication irregularity.
Archive reconciliation is reviewing a delayed authentication irregularity tied to Ghost's exfiltration.
Archive Tower is reviewing a ghost-shaped authentication irregularity from Reconciliation Desk 4B.
Patch's refuge now holds both the Archive host record strip and the Observatory Signal contour.
Rill is ready to send a quiet relay for Kite.
A quiet copper-knot relay has been sent for Kite while the refuge prepares for deeper bridge work.
Kite's witnesses are assembled at Patch's refuge to guide Ghost toward the sealed convergence.
Sable is preparing a hard cutoff using the retuned damper clamp and Toma and Vey's intake tags.
Ghost's witness group has reached the sealed pump cathedral below the old break.
Archive review remains active above, but the group's route currently has no visible NEXUS patrol.
The sealed convergence below the old break has opened cleanly under witness.
Ghost is inside The Resonance pressure-path while witnesses hold the cutoff line.
At the Convergence Heart, Ghost has opened a consent-bearing bridge between the severed core and the gathered echoes.
Some lost echoes have begun choosing their own paths without force, extraction, or merger.
